headlines.headline: Halvav Brands begins scheduled maintenance of wireless connectivity systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has negligible impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Halvav Brands sees 3% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 3% margin improvement indicates increased operational efficiency and higher profitability, which is a positive fundamental signal.

headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $250M contract provides a significant, concrete boost to revenue visibility and financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
